No casualties occurred, but the incident follows a previous attack on 25 March. Shuwaikh Port also sustained damage from a drone strike, impacting the country's trade operations.

articles.title: Sudarsan Pattnaik Creates Sand Art At Puri Beach To Mark 20 Years Of Earth Hour
articles.description: He further stated that this campaign has raised awareness and inspired people worldwide to take climate action.

articles.title: Iran allows 2 more LPG tankers of 'friend' India to cross Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Iran allows  more LPG tankers of friend India to cross Strait of Hormuz

articles.title: DMK to fight 164 of 234 seats, leaves 70 for allies in Tamil Nadu polls; MK Stalin to contest from Kolathur
articles.description: DMK to fight  of  seats leaves  for allies in Tamil Nadu polls MK Stalin to contest from Kolathur

articles.title: DMK finalises seat-sharing, seven allies to contest on ‘Rising Sun’ symbol
Strait of Hormuz: Two Indian LPG vessels reach Gujarat's Vadinar Terminal, more expected to follow, says report
articles.description: Jag Vasant reaches Gujarat via Strait of Hormuz: A shipment of 47,000 metric tonnes of LPG arrived at the Vadinar Terminal of DPA Kandla in Jamnagar, Gujarat, on Saturday.

articles.title: By attempting to destroy Bengal, BJP will lose power in country: Mamata Banerjee
articles.description: Addressing a poll rally in Raniganj, she announced that after winning the West Bengal Assembly elections for the fourth consecutive time, she would bring all political parties along to “capture” Delhi

articles.title: Defamation case against Sobha Surendran posted to October 24
articles.description: The case stems from statements allegedly made by her claiming that E.P. Jayarajan, a central committee member of the CPI(M)], had considered joining the BJP

No casualties occurred, but the incident follows a previous attack on 25 March. Shuwaikh Port also sustained damage from a drone strike, impacting the country's trade operations.

topStories.title: Call between PM Modi and Donald Trump only: India on reports of Elon Musk joining phone conversation
topStories.description: Elon Musk joined the phone call between Prime Minister Modi and US President Donald Trump that took place on Tuesday over West Asia conflict.

topStories.title: India Rejects Report Of Musk Joining Phone Call Between PM Modi And Trump On Iran War
topStories.description: Quoting an unnamed US official, the New York Times reported thatMusk participated in a phone call, an unusual appearance by a private citizen.

topStories.title: 'Epstein Island' replaces White House name on Android, Google blames fake Maps edit
topStories.description: A technical glitch caused the White House switchboard number to appear as 'Epstein Island' on some Android devices. Google confirmed the glitch and said it was due to a fake edit on Google Maps.

topStories.title: ‘Suspend flights in high-risk conflict zones’ in West Asia': Pilots' body writes to DGCA, seeks war risk insurance cover
topStories.description: Iran-US war: The pilot's association mentioned in its letter to the DGCA that “the current belligerents, USA, Israel and Iran have shot down civilian airlines in the fog of war of previous conflicts.”

topStories.title: India Denies Reports Of Musk Joining Trump-PM Modi Phone Call On Iran War
topStories.description: Trump had called PM Modi to discuss the war with Iran on Tuesday, the first interaction between the two leaders since Israel and the US' military strikes on Iran began on February 28.

topStories.title: Puducherry Congress leader AV Subramanian resigns from all party positions ahead of assembly polls
topStories.description: Subramanian cited ‘private reasons and unavoidable circumstances’ as reasons for the decision in a letter to V Vaithilingam, Puducherry Congress chief.

topStories.title: Goa sex scandal in which councillor's son has been arrested has more than 100 victims: Congress leader
topStories.description: When contacted, an official of the Crime Branch, which is investigating the case, said three girls have come forward so far with complaints

topStories.title: House Republicans reject Senate deal, prolonging partial government shutdown
topStories.description: Airport security agents have not been paid in more than a month due to a congressional impasse, causing travel chaos across the US.

topStories.title: Big win for Argentina — US appeals court reverses $16 billion ruling linked to oil company seizure
topStories.description: The appeals court ruling marks a significant victory for Argentine President Javier Milei and helps clear the government’s path to a return to international markets at some point.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Ratan Tata: ‘Ups and downs in life are very important to keep us going, because…’
topStories.description: Ratan Tata's insights stress that life's struggles are necessary for evolution and self-discovery. He advocates for a positive perspective on challenges, viewing them as integral to personal growth and resilience in the journey of life.

topStories.title: ‘Cuba is next’ — Trump hints at new focus for US military after Iran, Venezuela operations
topStories.description: Trump did not specify what precisely he was planning to do with Cuba.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods charged with driving under influence after crash
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods, the 15-time golf major champion, is released on bail following his arrest on charges of driving under the influence following a car crash in Florida.

dailyNews.title: Congress MP S Jothimani alleges lack of transparency in Tamil Nadu constituency selection process
dailyNews.description: S Jothimani accused the Tamil Nadu Congress leadership of conducting the seat-sharing and selection process in a “highly secretive manner.”

dailyNews.title: DHS takes emergency action to pay 50,000 US airport workers unpaid since mid-February
dailyNews.description: The Department of Homeland Security is taking emergency measures to pay 50,000 unpaid airport security officers, following significant work absences causing airport disruptions. Details here.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi lacks courage to oppose Israel's actions in West Bank: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh
dailyNews.description: “The current West Asia war is providing cover for Israel to move ahead on its vision of Greater Israel and also finishing off any hope for a Palestinian state,” Jairam Ramesh said

dailyNews.title: Strait of Hormuz to ‘Strait of Trump’ — Internet in splits over Trump's slip up, netizens say US President ‘on brand’
dailyNews.description: Trump said that his comment was a ‘mistake’ but then added that 'there's no accidents with me.'

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court flags repeated breaches of law on disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court warns of “general indifference” as case records reveal disclosure of sexual assault survivors’ identity, violating IPC Section 228A

dailyNews.title: US lifts sanctions on minerals industry of Venezuela, gains greater access to gold, diamonds, bauxite
dailyNews.description: Besides gold and the world's largest oil reserves, Venezuela also produces diamonds, bauxite and rare earths such as coltan, crucial for a range of high-tech products.

dailyNews.title: Houthis joining Iran in fight against US, Israel? Group claims first missile attack against Israel since war began
dailyNews.description: Hours after Saturday's missile launch, the Iran-backed Houthi movement in Yemen claimed responsibility for the attempted strike, a day after the group had warned of joining the war against US and Israel.

dailyNews.title: Inside Iran’s military: missiles, militias and a force built for survival
dailyNews.description: Experts say Iran's military is built to survive, not win conventionally, as the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps retains missiles, proxies and naval threats despite U.S. strikes.

dailyNews.title: House GOP rams through new DHS funding plan with shutdown far from over
dailyNews.description: The House passed a DHS stopgap bill, but the shutdown is expected to continue for several weeks as lawmakers leave Washington for Easter recess.

dailyNews.title: Facial recognition helped crack alleged student murder by illegal migrant – new bill could ban it: ret. cop
dailyNews.description: Facial recognition helped identify the suspect in Sheridan Gorman's alleged murder, but a new Illinois bill could ban the tool, a retired detective warns.

dailyNews.title: Spanberger denies ‘deal’ with swing-district Democrat as gerrymandering claims abound statewide
dailyNews.description: Gov. Spanberger denied a redistricting deal with Elaine Luria after a viral video showed Luria confronted over alleged backroom dealings in Virginia.

dailyNews.title: Castro Heirs Emerge Across Cuba’s Political Scene Amid Energy Crisis and Trump Threats
dailyNews.description: As Trump officials demand changes, Castro family members are suddenly popping up across Cuba’s political scene. Some even ask: Could one be the “Cuban Delcy?”

dailyNews.title: Trump Offers More Aid to Farmers, a Key Support Bloc Hurt by Tariffs and War
dailyNews.description: The president announced new loan guarantees at a White House event that appeared intended to reassure a group that has found itself caught in the crosshairs of some of his major policies.

dailyNews.title: ‘No Kings’ Protests Across U.S. Cities: What We Know
dailyNews.description: Thousands of demonstrations against the Trump administration are scheduled to take place in cities and towns across the country on Saturday.

dailyNews.title: On CPAC’s Main Stage, Fissures in the Party Trump Remade
dailyNews.description: The Conservative Political Action Conference typically seeks to establish orthodoxy with its roster of speakers. This year, organizers created space for dissent, highlighting ongoing schisms in the MAGA movement.

dailyNews.title: Is Iran a Political Problem for Trump? Tell Me How Long the War Lasts.
dailyNews.description: Historically, quagmire abroad and high prices at home are the ingredients of a failed presidency.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Strait of Hormuz the 'Strait of Trump'
dailyNews.description: Trump recently floated the possibility that the strait could be controlled jointly by "me and the ayatollah" as part of a resolution to the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Epstein victims sue Google and the Trump administration over alleged disclosure of personal information
dailyNews.description: A lawsuit filed in Northern California alleges that Google's AI features generated contact information for Epstein victims.

dailyNews.title: White House launches app touting Trump's record, with some key omissions
dailyNews.description: The app includes a link to report tips to Immigration and Customs Enforcement.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices close at highest level since 2022 as Iran negotiations fail to ease supply fears
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Iran war rages, Strait of Hormuz still blocked as Trump pushes for a deal
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is awaiting Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" guests for March 29, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's guests include White House border czar Tom Homan, Democratic Rep. Jim Himes, and former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.
